inline_comments.message:
OMG... seriously? do you guys even have a dedicated image where you hardcode your certificates?:D

I'll not complain in this patch as it is for el alto but I'm now creating a jira ticket for you to remove those as soon as possible from Frankfurt image, document in doc/oom_hardcoded_certificates.rst and deliver to your images as secrets.

https://jira.onap.org/browse/DCAEGEN2-2218
